goal: 修复 Sherlog 默认全局检索漏掉 stale coverage

summary.title: Guard find results against stale coverage
summary.what: Changed shlog find so it performs a read-only metadata freshness guard for the searched selector and returns nextAction when coverage is stale or missing, even when results are non-empty. Updated text output, JSON types, tests, docs, and release version 0.3.14.
summary.why: Default global find could silently return stale indexed results after new long-running sessions were created, causing agents to conclude history was absent even though raw sessions existed. The fix preserves sync as the only write path while making stale coverage visible at the recall surface.
summary.user_goal: 修复 Sherlog 默认全局检索漏掉 stale coverage

decisions.point: Whether find should auto-sync stale coverage
decisions.chose: Keep find read-only and return nextAction with concrete sync commands
decisions.rationale: Project rules keep sync as the only index mutation path; find can safely scan metadata for freshness without using raw content as recall evidence.

decisions.point: How to prevent misleading non-empty stale results
decisions.chose: Attach stale_or_missing_coverage nextAction even when results exist and print it in text output after results
decisions.rationale: The reported failure was not zero results; it was a stale result set that looked authoritative. The warning must survive non-empty result paths and cross-source merge.

decisions.chose: Update the published Sherlog skill package, JSON schema notes, failure cookbook, CLI surface docs, usage docs, and README
decisions.rationale: Agents must treat nextAction as a retry gate regardless of whether results are empty.

rejected.alternative: Only document that users should run sync manually
rejected.reason: That would not prevent agents from trusting stale non-empty find output.

review_notes: Validation: npm run check passed with 199 tests across 30 files.
Validation: npm run build and npm pack --dry-run --json passed.
Validation: built dist CLI find go.link2.bond returned the expected Codex hit plus stale_or_missing_coverage nextAction.

architectural_claims: find remains a read-only command: it may inspect source metadata for coverage freshness but content recall still comes only from the SQLite index.
sync remains the only command that writes index rows or coverage records.
behavioral_changes: find now returns nextAction.reason=stale_or_missing_coverage when searched coverage is stale or missing, including non-empty result sets.
cross-source find merges per-source stale coverage actions and prints next steps in text output even after listing results.

api_changes.signature: QueryNextAction.reason includes stale_or_missing_coverage and optional commands[]

migration_notes: No DB migration required; existing indexes remain readable but stale coverage is now surfaced by find.
